creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
On 11/21/12 18:59, ohauer@FreeBSD.org:
> it is on my roadmap, but with an update to apr-util-1.5.1
> which contains bsd related fixes for crypto.
> http://www.apache.org/dist/apr/CHANGES-APR-UTIL-1.5

I have nothing against immediate update to 1.5.1 ;-)

> if you are using the option crypto you need an update

True, I missed it in my patch.

> see http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/apr1-crypto.diff

It look good, let's go on.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Dan
